disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A well-demarcated, slowly-spreading itchy scaly rash with a raised advancing ring-like edge and central clearing in the groin creases, present for about three weeks
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe exactly what the rash looks like and where it is?
How long has the rash been there and has it been spreading?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a red, scaly, really itchy rash in both groin creases with a raised flaky edge that keeps creeping down my inner thighs, and the middle has gone a brownish colour. It's been there about three weeks.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The rash spares the scrotum and penis and there are no satellite pustules (pattern favouring dermatophyte tinea over candidal intertrigo)
trigger_question_examples: Does the rash involve the scrotum or penis at all?
Are there any little separate spots or pus-filled bumps at the edges?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The scrotum and penis are completely clear — it's just in the creases and inner thighs. I haven't noticed any separate little pus spots dotted around it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: In the last 4 days the patient applied a friend's potent topical corticosteroid (betamethasone valerate 0.1%) to the rash, after which it explosively worsened, became raw and burning
trigger_question_examples: Have you put any creams or ointments on it?
What changed in the last few days when it got worse?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: A mate gave me their strong steroid cream for eczema, and I've been rubbing it on for about four days. That's actually when it went crazy — much redder, raw and burning.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The itch and rash are strongly aggravated by sweating and friction; the patient is a heavy labourer who wears tight synthetic underwear
trigger_question_examples: Does anything make the itch or rash worse?
What kind of work do you do and what underwear do you usually wear?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I sweat a lot doing heavy labouring all day and I wear tight sporty underwear — the itch and rubbing are worst when I'm hot and sweaty.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The patient has a history of recurrent tinea including athlete's-foot-type symptoms (reservoir for re-infection of the groin)
trigger_question_examples: Have you had this or anything like it before?
Do you get any itching or peeling between your toes or on your feet?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, I've had itchy groin and athlete's foot on and off for years, but never as raw and sore as this.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: There is no fever, no rigors, no rapidly spreading hot swelling beyond the rash and no purulent discharge (secondary bacterial cellulitis screened negative on patient-obtainable data)
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fever, shivers or felt unwell in yourself?
Is the redness spreading fast and hot beyond the rash, or is there any thick foul-smelling pus?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fevers or shivers, I feel fine in myself otherwise, there's no thick smelly pus, and the redness isn't spreading fast and hot up my belly or thigh — it's just the raw burning rash itself.
